name: Stellar Bancorp, Inc.
business: Stellar Bancorp, Inc. provides a diversified range of commercial banking services primarily to small- to medium-sized businesses, professionals, and individual customers within the Houston and Beaumont MSAs and Dallas, Texas. As of December 31, 2025, the Company had total assets of $10.81 billion, total loans of $7.30 billion, and total deposits of $9.02 billion.

exposures.sentence: the cost and effects of cyber incidents or other failures, interruptions or security breaches of the Company's systems or those of the Company's customers or third-party providers;

catalysts.event: Closing of merger with Prosperity Bancshares, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: The closing of the Merger is expected to occur in the second quarter of 2026, subject to customary conditions, including approval of the Company's shareholders and regulatory approvals.
